heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 309a Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated for the purposes of sections 309 and 309a of this title the sum of $25,000,000 for each fiscal year, and not to exceed $1,500,000 of such sum shall be available for administrative purposes.
notes: Amendments1968— increased appropriation from $15,000,000 to $25,000,000.Pub. L. 90–2521965— increased appropriation from $12,000,000 to $15,000,000.Pub. L. 89–141963— increased appropriation from $7,500,000 to $12,000,000 and amount available for administrative purposes from $1,000,000 to $1,500,000.Pub. L. 88–2301961— increased appropriation to $7,500,000 and amount available for administrative purposes to $1,000,000.Pub. L. 87–273
amendments: Amendments1968— increased appropriation from $15,000,000 to $25,000,000.Pub. L. 90–2521965— increased appropriation from $12,000,000 to $15,000,000.Pub.
